sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on the yellow dot
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 20, 'col': 24}])
print(f"After clicking yellow dot: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check what changed
if last_action_result.get('board_changed'):
    before = last_transition.before_frame
    after = last_transition.after_frame
    before_ascii = before.ascii.split('\n')
    after_ascii = after.ascii.split('\n')
    diff_rows = [i for i in range(len(before_ascii)) if before_ascii[i] != after_ascii[i] and i != 63]
    print(f"Changed rows: {diff_rows}")
    for r in sorted(diff_rows):
        b_row = before_ascii[r]
        a_row = after_ascii[r]
        diffs = [(i, b_row[i], a_row[i]) for i in range(len(b_row)) if b_row[i] != a_row[i]]
        print(f"  Row {r}: {diffs[:15]}")

# Check current objects
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nCurrent non-background objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ('c', 'B', 'G', 'W', 'g'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
